articles.title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

articles.title: BBC sees destroyed villages in Israeli-occupied southern Lebanon
articles.summary: Travelling with a humanitarian convoy, BBC's Hugo Bachega has been given rare access to a part of Lebanon under Israeli occupation.

articles.title: Lebanese turtle conservationist Mona Khalil killed by Israeli strike
articles.summary: Mona Khalil, who had refused to leave the beach she had spent years protecting, died after several days in hospital, an environmental group said.

articles.title: Colombia's escalating, brutal internal conflict is defining its presidential election

articles.title: US to stop funding HIV programmes in South Africa
articles.summary: More than eight million South Africans are living with HIV – the highest number of any country in the world.

articles.summary: Australia was previously the only continent where the H5N1 bird flu strain had not yet been found.
